posts.text:
Forget Lemon - he’s auditioning to be first male co-host of The View. 

Newsom is the guy who wants to be president and didn’t remotely reject or push back on tuis in any way. And if he tacitly agrees on this - it’s yet another disqualifier for any presidential consideration.


Jason Cohen 🇺🇸 (@JasonJournoDC)

🚨NEW: Don Lemon🤦‍♂️

"We are saying that Iran shoots protesters. Well, so do we ... that makes us no better than them — if we are acting and doing the very same things that they're doing,

I as well…


Greg Price (@greg_price11)

I'll always remember Chuck Norris as the man who changed the course of dodgeball history by casting the deciding vote that allowed Average Joes to play in the championship of the Las Vegas International Dodgeball Open where they upset the heavily favored Globo Gym Purple Cobras.

RIP. 🙏

Resist the Mainstream (@ResisttheMS)

TUNE IN: George Conway claims that Americans are "f*cked" if President Trump "serves out his term."

"We can't last 34 more months of what we've seen in the last 14!"

"He's gonna trash everything once and for all!"

Video
  





— https://nitter.net/ResisttheMS/status/2034682562774470959#m

Hey PBS - did you ask about Mamdani’s wife disparaging blacks and Jews, or naah?


PBS News (@NewsHour)

EXCLUSIVE: While rhetoric disparaging Islam is not new, “there's an unabashed nature to it,” right now, New York City Mayor Zohran Mamdani said in an interview airing Friday.

“It is being echoed from the highest offices in this country,” he tells @IAmAmnaNawaz. “They do so without any sense of shame.”

Watch more from the interview on Friday's PBS News Hour.

Video
  





— https://nitter.n

Weird that Mehdi - the guy who insisted Gaza is worse than the holocaust — has turned off replies. Doesn’t the founder of “Zateo News” believe in free speech and the exchange of ideas?


Mehdi Hasan (@mehdirhasan)

She is linking to an article showing only MAGA Republicans support the war, and then claiming ‘Americans agree’ with it. Her own link shows her to be a liar. She’s a proud and open liar.

Reporters should treat her as such.



— https://nitter.net/mehdirhasan/status/203485552783484965

An absolutely perfect pairing. 10 outta 10…


Defiant L’s (@DefiantLs)

Don Lemon tells Gavin Newsom: “I had some conservative leanings, and I still do now, but I’ve matured, and I’ve grown a bit.”

Video
  





— https://nitter.net/DefiantLs/status/2035054010718462195#m

It’s weird how you never see Abigail Spanberger and Jennifer Welch in the same place, isn’t it?


Greg Price (@greg_price11)

Video
  





— https://nitter.net/greg_price11/status/2035036095369322707#m

Here’s saving democracy in action!


Ella Dorsey (@Ella__Dorsey)

Y'all... I've NEVER seen Hartsfield Jackson this bad. This is what security looks like this morning (Friday). We've talked to people that got to the airport at 3am that missed their 6am flight. 
@ATLNewsFirst @GAFollowers

— https://nitter.net/Ella__Dorsey/status/2034953731322638680#m

Well, when Talarico loses - there will always be a home waiting at The Bulwark…

Texas Democrat Senate nominee James Talarico — who's allegedly a devout Christian — is now talking about "God's sausage" and defends saying "God is nonbinary."

What is wrong with this sick freak?

Video
  





— https://nitter.net/RNCResearch/status/2035040202578669913#m

They’re not accusations. 

@timodc debases himself once again.

Watch his interview on the Bulwark Podcast with @Timodc  from last night’s live show in Dallas right now if you're a Bulwark+ subscriber!

Video
  





— https://nitter.net/BulwarkOnline/status/2034677479936340200#m

Swalwell makes Katie Porter sound almost human…


MAZE (@mazemoore)

CBS asked the candidates for Governor of California to name one misstep that Gavin Newsom has made as Governor. Name just one thing that Newsom has not done well as Governor.

Eric Swalwell was the only candidate who couldn't or wouldn't name a single thing that Gavin Newsom has gotten wrong as Governor. Empty Eric Swalwell is one of the most ret*rded people to ever be in American politics. If CA elects this absolute fool as Go

Not really going out on a limb here after concluding this is all an act.


Jason Cohen 🇺🇸 (@JasonJournoDC)

🚨NEW: James Carville *TRIGGERED* by Trump saying Gavin Newsom shouldn’t be president due to dyslexia🤬

"Let me tell you something, you a**h*ole. You know who has two thumbs, speaks French and has dyslexia? Moi! That's right, ME!"

"You son of a b*tch, you sorry low-life sack of sh*t, you nothing ... GO F*CK YOURSELF!"

"I love that I have dyslexia. I love I have a short attention span. The

Starting to think Mrs. Newsom is making Mrs. Walz look sane…


MAZE (@mazemoore)

2023. The "First Partner" of California is asked if she will call herself "First Partner" if her husband Gavin becomes President.

Ready for her crazy eyes in the White House?

BTW, watch how this self-proclaimed "defender of women" passively disses Melania.

Video
  





— https://nitter.net/mazemoore/status/2034698953090834575#m

MSNOW may have rearranged the deck chairs on the Titanic, but this kind of tone-deaf commentary will remain as long as the same people keep being put on the air with zero pushback whatsoever…


Western Lensman (@WesternLensman)

LEFT: NYT’s Mara Gay: It's hard to find anything popular that Republicans are pursuing. It’s a joke that the SAVE America Act is even being debated by the Senate.

RIGHT: Latest polling on the SAVE America Act.

Video
  





— https://nitter.net/WesternLensman/status/20

Welp.


Libs of TikTok (@libsoftiktok)

Japanese Reporter: "Why didn't you tell U.S. allies…like Japan, about the war before attacking Iran?"

President Trump: "We didn't tell anyone about it because we wanted SURPRISE. Who knows better about surprise than Japan? Why didn't you tell me about Pearl Harbor?"

BOOM
